economic_notes: Nation has significant business enterprises including forestry, oil and gas services, road construction, renewable energy (Sukunka Wind Project), nursery/plant services, reclamation services, real estate, and fibre optic communications. Royal Trust holds $11,360,015 in trust for settlement fund distributions to members.
notes: Audit is qualified on two bases: (1) Nikanese Wah Tzee Stewardship Society (50% government partnership) did not prepare PSAS-compliant financial statements so auditors could not obtain sufficient evidence; (2) 4 Evergreen Resources LP (GBE) holds a 17% partnership interest recorded at cost rather than equity method per IFRS, resulting in inability to verify carrying value. Nation has 22 entities accounted for as GBEs under modified equity method plus 1 government partnership (Nikanese Wah Tzee) under proportionate consolidation. Income from GBEs of $6,720,048 is a significant component of the $10,656,241 annual surplus. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC + CMHC + Gov of Canada + FNHA + Province of BC + BC Hydro + BC First Nations Gaming = 3854210+12549+131910+1258440+959056+1388139+509283. Economic development expenses $1,915,362 and recreation/culture $615,179 not mapped to standard categories. Royal Trust holds $11.36M in settlement funds for members outside the financial statements.
